title: Bitter Broccoli Bowl
description: A low-calorie-friendly British dish featuring Chinese broccoli and a deglaze with low-sodium vegetable stock for added flavor.
instructions: Wash and roughly chop the Chinese broccoli.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add vegetable stock to the pan with the onions. Bring to a boil and let simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Stir in the cooked Chinese broccoli into the vegetable stock mixture. Reduce heat and simmer for another 10-15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Serve warm as a side dish or over a bed of quinoa for a complete meal.
